root_cause.summary: The jest test `pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc` in `test/config/get.ts:32` fails because `pnpm config get @my-org:registry` returns the registry URL with a trailing slash (`https://my-org.registry.example.com/`) while the test expects it without one (`https://my-org.registry.example.com`). The single failing assertion (1 of 485 tests) drives the pnpm CI test job to exit code 1.

required_signals.value: pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc

relevant_tests: test/config/get.ts > pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc

evidence_spans.reason: Primary jest failure block: `FAIL test/config/get.ts` header, failing test name, the expect/Received assertion diff, the source-code excerpt around the failing assertion, and the stack location. Sufficient on its own to identify root cause.

Jest test totals (1 failed of 485) plus the pnpm/ELIFECYCLE wrapper failure and `##[error]Process completed with exit code 1.` GHA annotation — confirms the single test failure propagated to the job exit code.
